name: Covered Call
description: Hold underlying stock and sell OTM call options to generate income. Caps upside but provides premium income and slight downside cushion.
entry_rules: Hold or buy 100 shares of underlying
Sell 1 OTM call at target delta and DTE
exit_rules: Let call expire worthless if OTM at expiry
Buy back call if premium decays to 80% of entry credit
Accept assignment if ITM at expiry (stock called away)
roll_rules: If call is ITM with > 5 DTE, consider rolling up and out
Roll to next monthly if current call expires worthless
Do not roll into earnings week
objective: Generate income from premium selling while holding long equity exposure

risk_profile.max_loss: Unlimited downside on underlying minus premium received

best_environment: Neutral to mildly bullish, elevated IV, no major catalysts
